description_long: This is a polygonal olive-green backpack with a rugged, utilitarian design, featuring a large main compartment and two side pockets. The front of the backpack displays a circular yellow patch with a smiling face and a red nose, adding a playful decorative touch. Black straps run vertically down the front and sides, providing structural support and likely serving as adjustable shoulder straps. The backpack has visible zippers on the main compartment and side pockets, with zipper pulls for easy access. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a durable synthetic fabric, possibly nylon or polyester. The overall shape is boxy with angular edges, and the backpack is designed for carrying personal items in urban environments.
description: Olive-green, boxy backpack with black straps, side pockets, and a yellow smiley face patch on the front. Features visible zippers and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the main compartment and one side pocket, with black straps visible along the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow smiley face patch, two black vertical straps, and the main front pocket with zipper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the other side pocket and the continuation of the black straps.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the two main shoulder straps and the back panel, with no decorative elements visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular yellow patch with a smiling face and red nose is located on the upper front of the backpack. No text or brand name is visible.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, black, adjustable shoulder straps are attached to the back, with additional black vertical straps on the front for reinforcement. No chest or waist straps are visible.
attribute_zipper_placement: One zipper runs vertically down the center of the main compartment, and two horizontal zippers are present on each side pocket. An additional horizontal zipper is on the front pocket.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One large main compartment, two side pockets (one on each side), and one front pocket below the smiley face patch. All pockets are externally accessible.
attribute_decorative_elements: A yellow smiley face patch with a red nose is sewn onto the front. No other decorative elements are visible.
